verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez:
ፈኑ ፡ ዕደወ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ዐይን ፡ እለ ፡ ይሬእይዋ ፡ ለምድረ ፡ ከናአን ፡ እንተ ፡ አነ ፡ እሁቦሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡
                  እስራኤል ፡ ከመ ፡ ይኰንንዋ ፤ አሐዱ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ነገዶሙ ፡ ወእምውስተ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ ዘአብያተ ፡
                  አበዊሆሙ ፤ ወትፌኑ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዐበይቶሙ ።

translations.lxx: Send for thee men, and let them spy the land of the Chananites, which I give to the sons of Israel for a possession; one man for a tribe, thou shalt send them away according to their families, every one of them a prince.
translations.kjv: Send thou men, that they may search the land of Canaan, which I give unto the children of Israel: of every tribe of their fathers shall ye send a man, every one a ruler among them.

verses.geez:
[*ወፈነዎሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ እምነ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ዘፋራን ፡ በቃለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወእሉ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ዐበይቶሙ ፡*]
                  ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እሙንቱ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses sent them out of the wilderness of Pharan by the word of the Lord; all these were the princes of the sons of Israel.
translations.kjv: And Moses by the commandment of the LORD sent them from the wilderness of Paran: all those men were heads of the children of Israel.

verses.geez: ወዝንቱ ፡ አስማቲሆሙ ፡ ዘእምነገደ ፡ ሮቤል ፡ [ሰ]ሙ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዝ[ኩር] ።

translations.lxx: And these are their names: of the tribe of Ruben, Samuel the son of Zachur.
translations.kjv: And these were their names: of the tribe of Reuben, Shammua the son of Zaccur.

verses.geez: ወዘእምነገደ ፡ ስምዖን ፡ ሰፈጥ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሱሪ ።

translations.lxx: Of the tribe of Symeon, Saphat the son of Suri.
translations.kjv: Of the tribe of Simeon, Shaphat the son of Hori.

verses.geez: ወዘእምነገደ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ካ[ሌብ] ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዬፎኔ ።

translations.lxx: Of the tribe of Judah, Chaleb the son of Jephonne.
translations.kjv: Of the tribe of Judah, Caleb the son of Jephunneh.

verses.geez: ወዘእምነገደ ፡ ይስካር ፡ ኢጋል ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዮሴፍ ።

translations.lxx: Of the tribe of Issachar, Ilaal the son of Joseph.
translations.kjv: Of the tribe of Issachar, Igal the son of Joseph.

verses.geez: ወዘእምነገደ ፡ ኤፍሬም ፡ አውሴ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ነዌ ።

translations.lxx: Of the tribe of Ephraim, Ause the son of Naue.
translations.kjv: Of the tribe of Ephraim, Oshea the son of Nun.

verses.geez: ወዘእምነገደ ፡ ብንያሚ ፡ ፈልጢ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ራፈው ።

translations.lxx: Of the tribe of Benjamin, Phalti the son of Raphu.
translations.kjv: Of the tribe of Benjamin, Palti the son of Raphu.

verses.geez: ወዘእምነገደ ፡ ዛቡሎን ፡ ጉዲዬል ፡ ወልደ ፡ [ሶ]ዲ ።

translations.lxx: Of the tribe of Zabulon, Gudiel the son of Sudi.
translations.kjv: Of the tribe of Zebulun, Gaddiel the son of Sodi.

verses.geez: ወዘእምነገዶ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ዘእምደቂቀ ፡ መናሴ ፡ ገዲ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሱሲ ።

translations.lxx: Of the tribe of Joseph of the sons of Manasse, Gaddi the son of Susi.
translations.kjv: Of the tribe of Joseph, namely, of the tribe of Manasseh, Gaddi the son of Susi.

verses.geez: ወዘእምነገደ ፡ ዳን ፡ አሚሔል ፡ ወልደ ፡ ገማሊ ።

translations.lxx: Of the tribe of Dan, Amiel the son of Gamali.
translations.kjv: Of the tribe of Dan, Ammiel the son of Gemalli.

verses.geez: ወዘእምነገደ ፡ አሴር ፡ ሳቱር ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሚካኤል ።

translations.lxx: Of the tribe of Aser, Sathur the son of Michael.
translations.kjv: Of the tribe of Asher, Sethur the son of Michael.

verses.geez: ወዘእምነገደ ፡ ንፍታሌም ፡ ናቢ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ያቢ ።

translations.lxx: Of the tribe of Nephthali, Nabi the son of Sabi.
translations.kjv: Of the tribe of Naphtali, Nahbi the son of Vophsi.

verses.geez: ወዘእምነገደ ፡ ጋድ ፡ ጉዲያል ፡ ወልደ ፡ ማኪ ።

translations.lxx: Of the tribe of Gad, Gudiel the son of Macchi.
translations.kjv: Of the tribe of Gad, Geuel the son of Machi.

verses.geez:
ዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ አስማቲሆሙ ፡ ለዕደው ፡ እለ ፡ ፈነወ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይርአይዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወሰመዮ ፡ ሙሴ
                  ፡ ለአውሴ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ነዌ ፡ ኢየሱስ ።

translations.lxx: These are the names of the men whom Moses sent to spy out the land; and Moses called Ause the son of Naue, Joshua.
translations.kjv: These are the names of the men which Moses sent to spy out the land. And Moses called Oshea the son of Nun Jehoshua.

verses.geez:
ወፈነዎሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይርአይዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ከናአን ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ዕረጉ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ገዳም ፡
                  ወእምዝ ፡ ተዐርጉ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብር ።

translations.lxx: And Moses sent them to spy out the land of Chanaan, and said to them, Go up by this wilderness; and ye shall go up to the mountain,
translations.kjv: And Moses sent them to spy out the land of Canaan, and said unto them, Get you up this way southward, and go up into the mountain:

verses.geez:
ወርእይዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ ከመ ፡ እፎ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ወሕዝብኒ ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ እመ ፡ ጽኑዓን
                  ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ወእመ ፡ ድኩማን ፡ ወእመ ፡ ውሑዳን ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ወእመ ፡ ብዘኃን ።

translations.lxx: and ye shall see the land, what it is, and the people that dwells on it, whether it is strong or weak, or whether they are few or many.
translations.kjv: And see the land, what it is; and the people that dwelleth therein, whether they be strong or weak, few or many;

verses.geez:
ወእንተ ፡ ከመ ፡ እፎ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድራ ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ እመ ፡ ሠናይት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ወእመ ፡
                  እኪት ፡ ወዘከመ ፡ እፎ ፡ ውእቶን ፡ አህጉሪሆ[ሙ] ፡ እለ ፡ ውስቴቶን ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ወለእመ ፡ ቦንቱ ፡ ቅጽረ ፡
                  ወለእመ ፡ አልቦንቱ ።

translations.lxx: And what the land is on which they dwell, whether it is good or bad; and what the cities are wherein these dwell, whether they dwell in walled cities or unwalled.
translations.kjv: And what the land is that they dwell in, whether it be good or bad; and what cities they be that they dwell in, whether in tents, or in strong holds;

verses.geez:
ወእንተ ፡ ከመ ፡ እፎ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድራ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ጥልልት ፡ ወለእመ ፡ ይብስት ፡ ለእመ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ አእዋመ
                  ፡ ወለእመ ፡ አልቦቱ ፡ ወርእየክሙ ፡ ንሥኡ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ፍሬሃ ፡ ወመዋዕሊሁ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ ማእረር ፡ እንበለ ፡ ይትቀሠም ፡
                  ወይን ።

translations.lxx: And what the land is, whether rich or poor; whether there are trees in it or no: and ye shall persevere and take of the fruits of the land: and the days were the days of spring, the forerunners of the grape.
translations.kjv: And what the land is, whether it be fat or lean, whether there be wood therein, or not. And be ye of good courage, and bring of the fruit of the land. Now the time was the time of the firstripe grapes.

verses.geez: ወዐርጉ ፡ ወርእይዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ እምነ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ዘ[ፂን] ፡ እስከ ፡ ሮዖብ ፡ እንዘ ፡ የሐውሩ ፡ ለኤመት ።

translations.lxx: And they went up and surveyed the land from the wilderness of Sin to Rhoob, as men go in to Æmath.
translations.kjv: So they went up, and searched the land from the wilderness of Zin unto Rehob, as men come to Hamath.

verses.geez:
ወዐርጉ ፡ እንተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ወበጽሑ ፡ እስከ ፡ ኬብሮን ፡ ወህየ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ አኪ[መ]ን ፡ ወሴሲ ፡ ወተላሚ ፡ ፍጥረቱ ፡
                  ለኤናቅ ፡ ወኬብሮንሂ ፡ እንተ ፡ በሰብፀቱ ፡ ዓመት ፡ ተነድቀት ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ሀገረ ፡ ጠኒ ፡ ዘግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And they went up by the wilderness, and departed as far as Chebron; and there was Achiman, and Sessi, and Thelami, the progeny of Enach. Now Chebron was built seven years before Tanin of Egypt.
translations.kjv: And they ascended by the south, and came unto Hebron; where Ahiman, Sheshai, and Talmai, the children of Anak, were. (Now Hebron was built seven years before Zoan in Egypt.)

verses.geez:
ወበጽሑ ፡ እስከ ፡ ቈላተ ፡ ዐጽቅ ፡ ወርእይዋ ፡ ወገመዱ ፡ እምህየ ፡ ሐረገ ፡ ወይን ፡ ወውስቴታ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ አስካል ፡
                  ወጾርዎ ፡ በመዝለል ፡ ወእምውስተ ፡ ሮማንሂ ፡ ወእምውስተ ፡ በለስሂ ።

translations.lxx: And they came to the valley of the cluster and surveyed it; and they cut down thence a bough and one cluster of grapes upon it, and bore it on staves, and they took of the pomegranates and the figs.
translations.kjv: And they came unto the brook of Eshcol, and cut down from thence a branch with one cluster of grapes, and they bare it between two upon a staff; and they brought of the pomegranates, and of the figs.

verses.geez: ወሰመይዎ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ መካን ፡ ቈላ ፡ ሐረግ ፡ [በእንተ ፡ ሐረግ ፡] ዘገመዱ ፡ እምህየ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And they called that place, The valley of the cluster, because of the cluster which the children of Israel cut down from thence.
translations.kjv: The place was called the brook Eshcol, because of the cluster of grapes which the children of Israel cut down from thence.

verses.geez: ወገብኡ ፡ እምህየ ፡ ርእዮሙ ፡ ይእተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ በአርብዓ ፡ ጽባሕ ።

translations.lxx: And they returned from thence, having surveyed the land, after forty days.
translations.kjv: And they returned from searching of the land after forty days.

verses.geez:
ወሐዊሮሙ ፡ በጽሑ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወአሮን ፡ ወኀበ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ ተዓይኒሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡
                  ዘፋራን ፡ ቃዴስ ፡ ወነገርዎሙ ፡ ዜናሆሙ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ተዓይኒሆሙ ፡ ወአርአይዎሙ ፡ ፍሬሃ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And they proceeded and came to Moses and Aaron and all the congregation of the children of Israel, to the wilderness of Pharan Cades; and they brought word to them and to all the congregation, and they shewed the fruit of the land:
translations.kjv: And they went and came to Moses, and to Aaron, and to all the congregation of the children of Israel, unto the wilderness of Paran, to Kadesh; and brought back word unto them, and unto all the congregation, and shewed them the fruit of the land.

verses.geez:
ወነገርዎሙ ፡ ወይቤሉ ፡ በጻሕነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ኀበ ፡ ፈነውከነ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ ትውሕዝ ፡ ሐሊበ ፡
                  ወመዓረ ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ፍሬሃ ።

translations.lxx: and they reported to him, and said, We came into the land into which thou sentest us, a land flowing with milk and honey; and this is the fruit of it.
translations.kjv: And they told him, and said, We came unto the land whither thou sentest us, and surely it floweth with milk and honey; and this is the fruit of it.

verses.geez:
ወሕዝብኒ ፡ ዘይነብር ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ጽኑዕ ፡ ወአህጉሪሃኒ ፡ ጽኑዕ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ወዐበይት ፡ ወቦንቱ ፡
                  ቅጽረ ፡ ወሙላዱ ፡ ለኤናቅ ፡ ርኢነ ፡ በህየ ።

translations.lxx: Only the nation that dwells upon it is bold, and they have very great and strong walled towns, and we saw there the children of Enach.
translations.kjv: Nevertheless the people be strong that dwell in the land, and the cities are walled, and very great: and moreover we saw the children of Anak there.

verses.geez:
ወዐማሌቅ ፡ ኅዱራን ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ መንገለ ፡ አዜብ ፡ ወኬጤዎስ ፡ ወአሞሬዎስ ፡ ወኤዌዎስ ፡ ወኢየቡሴዎስ
                  ፡ ኅዱራን ፡ ውስተ ፡ አድባሪሃ ፡ ወከናአንሰ ፡ ኅዱራን ፡ መንገለ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ወመንገለ ፡ ፈለገ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ።

translations.lxx: And Amalec dwells in the land toward the south: and the Chettite and the Evite, and the Jebusite, and the Amorite dwells in the hill country: and the Chananite dwells by the sea, and by the river Jordan.
translations.kjv: The Amalekites dwell in the land of the south: and the Hittites, and the Jebusites, and the Amorites, dwell in the mountains: and the Canaanites dwell by the sea, and by the coast of Jordan.

verses.geez:
ወአዘዘ ፡ ካሌብ ፡ ያርምም ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ [ወይቤ ፡] አልቦ ፡ አላ ፡ ዐሪገ ፡ ነዐርግ ፡ ወንትዋረሳ ፡
                  እስመ ፡ ክሂለኒ ፡ ንክሎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Chaleb stayed the people from speaking before Moses, and said to him, Nay, but we will go up by all means, and will inherit it, for we shall surely prevail against them.
translations.kjv: And Caleb stilled the people before Moses, and said, Let us go up at once, and possess it; for we are well able to overcome it.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሉ ፡ እልክቱ ፡ እለ ፡ ዐርጉ ፡ ምስሌሆሙ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ኢነዐርግ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኢንክል ፡ ዐሪገ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ውእቱ ፡
                  ሕዝብ ፡ እስመ ፡ ይጸንዑ ፡ እምኔነ ፡ ፈድፋደ ።

translations.lxx: But the men that went up together with him said, We will not go up, for we shall not by any means be able to go up against the nation, for it is much stronger than we.
translations.kjv: But the men that went up with him said, We be not able to go up against the people; for they are stronger than we.

verses.geez:
ወግርምተ ፡ ረሰይዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ ርእዩ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይብሉ ፡ ምድር ፡
                  እንተ ፡ ሖርነ ፡ ከመ ፡ ንርአያ ፡ ምድር ፡ ይእቲ ፡ እንተ ፡ ተዐቅቦሙ ፡ ለእለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡
                  ዘርኢነ ፡ ዕደው ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ እለ ፡ ፍድፉድ ፡ ኑኆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And they brought a horror of that land which they surveyed upon the children of Israel, saying, The land which we passed by to survey it, is a land that eats up its inhabitants; and all the people whom we saw in it are men of extraordinary stature.
translations.kjv: And they brought up an evil report of the land which they had searched unto the children of Israel, saying, The land, through which we have gone to search it, is a land that eateth up the inhabitants thereof; and all the people that we saw in it are men of a great stature.

verses.geez: ወርኢነ ፡ በህየ ፡ እለ ፡ [ያርብ]ሕ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ቅድሜሆሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ አናብጥ ፡ እለ ፡ ከማሁኒ ፡ ቅድሜሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And there we saw the giants; and we were before them as locusts, yea even so were we before them.
translations.kjv: And there we saw the giants, the sons of Anak, which come of the giants: and we were in our own sight as grasshoppers, and so we were in their sight.
